citations.excerpt: Redacted draft uses initials instead of full name.
Redacted draft uses placeholder for matriculation number.
Redacted draft removes transaction details from bank statement reference.
No residual PII found in redacted draft.

findings.text: Redacted draft replaces full name 'Anfal Elbushra' with initials 'A.E.' as per redaction annotations.
Redacted draft replaces matriculation number '40805511' with placeholder '[REDACTED-MATRIC]' as per redaction annotations.
Redacted draft removes bank statement transaction details as per redaction annotations.
No residual PII detected in redacted draft beyond the redactions specified in annotations.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Redaction Verification Report

## Task: Verify redactions in complaint draft

### Findings
1. Full name 'Anfal Elbushra' replaced with initials 'A.E.' (supported, confidence 0.95)
2. Matriculation number '40805511' replaced with placeholder '[REDACTED-MATRIC]' (supported, confidence 0.95)
3. Bank statement transaction details removed (supported, confidence 0.9)
4. No residual PII detected (supported, confidence 0.85)

### Uncertainties
- Exact scope of bank statement redaction is unclear; generic redaction may not cover all transaction details.

### Risks
- Indirect identifiers (dates, amounts) may still pose re-identification risk.

### Redaction Flags
- Bank statement redaction should be reviewed for completeness.

### Conclusion
Redactions align with annotations. Minor uncertainties and risks noted for human review.
proposed_artifacts.title: Redaction Verification Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Review the redacted complaint draft for indirect identifiers (e.g., dates, amounts, unique events) that could re-identify the individual. Propose additional redactions if necessary.
proposed_tasks.title: Review indirect identifiers in redacted draft

redaction_flags.text: Redaction of bank statement details is generic; verify that all transaction-specific data is removed.

risk_flags.text: Redacted draft may still contain indirect identifiers (e.g., dates, amounts) that could re-identify the individual.

summary: Verified redactions in complaint draft against redaction annotations. Found that the redacted draft correctly replaces full name with initials, replaces matriculation number with placeholder, and removes bank statement transaction details. No residual PII detected. All redactions align with annotations.

uncertainties.text: Redaction annotations mention bank statement transaction details removal, but redacted draft only shows a generic redaction; exact scope of removal is unclear.
